questions.q: What is the aspect ratio for Stories and Reels?
questions.explanation: 9:16 full portrait vertical for Stories and Reels.

questions.q: You want to know how many EXTRA sales your campaign generated vs the scenario of not having run it. Which tool?
questions.explanation: Conversion Lift measures incrementality: causal sales attributable to the campaign.

questions.q: How many variables should you change in a correct A/B test?
questions.explanation: ONE single variable. Changing 2+ means you can't isolate the cause of the result.

questions.q: Which attribution models exist in Ads Manager?
questions.explanation: Only Standard and Incremental. Custom does NOT exist in Ads Manager.

questions.q: If you combine Advantage+ Creative with Asset Customization, which one prevails?
options: Asset Customization (manual) has priority in the customized placements
questions.explanation: The manual setting wins in the placements where you explicitly customized.
